scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run package && npm run config && npm run sass && npm run sass:min && npm run copy:sass
scripts.clean: rm -rf dist || true && mkdir -p dist/css dist/scss
scripts.sass: node-sass scss/import-global.scss --output-style=expanded --source-map-embed -o dist/css && mv dist/css/import-global.css dist/css/styles.css
scripts.sass:min: node-sass scss/import-global.scss --output-style=compressed -o dist/css && mv dist/css/import-global.css dist/css/styles.min.css
